channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-20
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. The `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects have both made administrative updates, with `escicheck` also synchronizing its `main` branch with the `escicheckapp` repository to reflect the latest `effectcheck` version. Meanwhile, `oddpub` has updated its ontogenerator to version 7.3.0 and made several documentation improvements. The `coarse` project has re-enabled Fable 5 in its model picker, and `regcheck` has fixed several bugs, including issues with its demo page, card preview, and ad blocker interference. Additionally, `docpluck` has made several fixes and updates, including addressing issues with caption loss and rendering. These updates demonstrate the ongoing collaboration and commitment to improvement across our community's projects.

28 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub9 commits
tenzing7 commits
metacheck6 commits
regcheck6 commits
